_comment: USP-only approved offer language for collections_law vertical. Built from uploaded one-pager (Ugly Sweater Party LLC). No external business context (MyPalette, MetaSill, artist, creator, gallery) authorized without cross_vertical_approval.json bridge.

offer_framing.opening_angle: Denver-area workflow improvement firm reaching out to collections law firms
positioning_statements: human-reviewed workflow systems for collections law firms
practical workflow support to reduce manual operational work
founder-led team focused on controlled operational workflow improvement
offer_framing.call_to_action: brief call to discuss how operational workflow improvement could serve your firm
offer_framing.offer_context: call to explore fit — no cost, no commitment

pain_point_mapping.intake_routing: intake handling, case routing, and document movement requiring too much manual effort
pain_point_mapping.email_friction: email triage, internal handoffs, and recurring reminders creating team friction
pain_point_mapping.memory_dependency: too much operational workflow living in inboxes, staff memory, and repeated admin follow-up
pain_point_mapping.reporting_gaps: cleaner intake handling, smoother case routing, and better reporting flow needed

target_client_profile.firm_characteristics: dedicated teams needing cleaner intake handling, smoother case routing, better reporting flow, and less day-to-day workflow depending on inboxes, memory, and repeated manual coordination
target_client_profile.service_area: Denver, Boulder, Longmont, and surrounding areas

process_steps.1_diagnose: Discovery call plus focused review of current workflow, intake points, reporting flow, and handoff gaps
process_steps.2_design: Recommend the highest-value fix, confirm scope, and adjust the plan based on client feedback
process_steps.3_build_harden: Implement the solution, hand it off cleanly, and support the team for 2 weeks so it sticks

offer_a.name: Operational Workflow Review
offer_a.price_rule: never mention $350 in cold outreach — price only if prospect asks

offer_b.name: Done-for-You Automation Starter
offer_b.price_rule: never mention $2,500 in cold outreach — price only if prospect asks
includes: one automation or human-reviewed assisted process

A_tier_named: workflow improvement for your Denver collections firm
question about your firm's operational workflow
C_tier_generic: Denver collections law firm workflow improvement opportunity
Collections law firm operational workflow review — Denver
law firm workflow fit call — Denver

body_language_rules.footer_context: founder-led implementation partner for controlled workflow support, human-reviewed systems, and operational cleanup

cta_language.primary_cta: reply to book a free 10-minute discovery call
cta_language.call_recipient: reply to the email to schedule with the co-founder
cta_language.barrier_removal: no cost, no commitment — exploratory call only
cta_language.fee_credit_note: 50% of discovery/audit fee applies toward a build

compliance_disclaimer: administrative workflow support only; not legal advice, FDCPA or compliance guarantees, or autonomous client communication. Results vary by firm.
author: human_operator_from_uploaded_one_pager
